params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a combinational logic circuit with two distinct outputs, p1y and p2y. The output p1y is asserted low if any of the inputs p1a, p1b, p1c, p1d, p1e, or p1f are high, or if any of the inputs p1g, p1h, and p1i are high, functioning as a multi-input OR gate with an AND combination. The output p2y is asserted low if either both inputs p2a and p2b are high or both inputs p2c and p2d are high, representing a 2-to-1 selection among pairs of inputs using OR and AND logic.
